texto: When you are criticised don't ignore it, but don't get overpowered by it, and certainly there is no need to be defensive about it. texto: Sometimes standing for truth is painful and an isolated journey because truth is not always what we like to hear and live with. However, it is your belief in the purity of truth, your confidence in yourself and your godly values that will give you the strength to be a torchbearer of truth. With truth you are always a winner even if it comes late or with a price to pay.
